mapper.sql: id, recipe_id, user_id, name, quantity, is_main, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO recipe_ingredient ( id, recipe_id, user_id, name, quantity, is_main, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.recipeId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.name}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.isMain}, #{item.sort}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recipe_ingredient WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe_ingredient SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE recipe_ingredient SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}

update.foreach:
UPDATE recipe_ingredient
name = #{item.name}, quantity = #{item.quantity}, is_main = #{item.isMain}, sort = #{item.sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{item.id} AND deleted = 0
